imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical Bazi destined partner portrait report. Soft illustrated portrait of a future partner archetype, elegant beige report card. English modules: Spouse Palace, Partner Traits, Meeting Window, Relationship Pattern, Element Match, Appearance Clues. Bazi chart motifs and small icons. English-only visible text. No Chinese characters anywhere. Clean readable English labels. No watermarks, no fake platform logos, no unreadable pseudo text. variant focus: Bazi Destined Partner Portrait V1. visible text language: English only.
